ocr_findings.description: Balance-scale illustration (本人拒否率/他人受入率 tradeoff visual) and 2要素認証 3-panel diagram (記憶/所有物/生体情報 with examples) both replaced by 'img-0.jpeg' and 'img-1.jpeg' placeholders. Category labels パスワード/暗証番号/キャッシュカード/USBメモリ/虹彩/指紋 in the diagram not captured in OCR.

reviewer_notes: 2要素認証 page: balance-scale diagram and 3-factor authentication panel are image-only; their labels are partially covered in the prose. Body text for 2要素認証 definition, ATM example, and exam-frequency note all accurately captured. No high-severity findings.
